question1: ID: Q043_3763      Based on the topology below, calculate the COMPLETE ROUTING TABLE for HA, R, and HB.      Use the format: NETWORK PREFIX | GATEWAY | INTERFACE.      [topology]      SUBNETS:      	* neta : 172.27.191.0/24   	* netb : 172.24.138.0/24      IP ASSIGNMENTS:      	* ha-eth0 : 172.27.191.6/24   	* r1-eth0 : 172.27.191.2/24   	* r1-eth1 : 172.24.138.11/24   	* hb-eth0 : 172.24.138.6/24      ANSWER GUIDELINES:      	* Write ONE ROUTE PER ROW, with no extra text. You can leave unused rows BLANK.   	* Please fill EACH DEVICE in its own routing table: [HA], [R1], [HB].   	* Use 0.0.0.0/0 for default network prefix.   	* Use * for directly connected networks.   	* Use ETHX for interface.
